title: Avoid using escape characters outside of raw strings
description: Avoid using escape characters outside of raw strings to improve code readability and maintainability.
message: Avoid using escape characters outside of raw strings.
impact: Impact on code readability and maintainability
recommendation: Use raw strings where possible or correctly escape strings using \ before special characters.

noncompliant.description: Using an escape character outside of a raw string

why_is_this_an_issue: Using escape characters outside of raw strings can make the code less readable and more error-prone.
how_to_fix: Use raw strings where possible or properly escape strings using double backslashes before special characters.

metadata.title: Avoid using escape characters outside of raw strings
